prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-SPACEGUNS8646-PARENT Product Type: TOY_GUN Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Galaxy Guardian Space Blaster Toy with Flashing LED Lights and Sounds (2 Colors) Description: The Kidplokio Galaxy Guardian Space Blaster Toy Gun with awesome flashing LED lights and sounds, lets little space rangers blast their enemies in to the next galaxy and beyond. The futuristic, space-themed toy gun is ideal for endless imaginative opportunities, whether it is battling a new species of aliens or evil space villains, little Galactic Guardians will be at the ready.

Expand little ones' imagination and creativity with this interactive space toy gun; A great toy to get kids off the couch and reduce screen time from cell phones and computers, the toy gun is action packed, boasting some seriously cool pretend play fighting features that will have kids up on their feet in search of the next alien invasion or a cross galaxy mission.

This Top Secret Mission Galaxy Guardian toy gun features loud blasting sounds and out of this world light effects; pull the trigger and watch spectacular spinning LED lights that illuminate in the colors, red, blue, and green for the ultimate in intergalactic fighting fun. The sound effects and flashing LED lights make playtime even more fun and realistic. And, made of highly durable, non-toxic plastic, this Galaxy Guardian Space Blaster toy gun is ready for both indoor or outdoor playtime.

The galaxy guardian space blaster toy gun comes assembled with batteries included, so the superhero action can start right out of the box. No screwdrivers, batteries or other tools required to get this galaxy guardian toy gun up and running.

Let the space missions commence.

Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts)

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: gun toy space toys galaxy laser lights halloween costumes for women men girls costume boys props 6 year old 4-5 4 5 age 7 10 gifts pretend play stocking stuffers 9 8 11 12 guns 3 2 kids best sellers 6-10 black red blue shooter fun stuff games good n Features: - GALAXY GUARDIAN SPACE BLASTER TOY GUN: As defenders of our solar system and unknown galaxies beyond, kids will need the Kidplokio Galaxy Guardian Space Blaster Toy Gun to keep pretend play space missions running at top speed! Featuring colorful, spinning lights and awesome blasting sound effects, aliens and evil galactic villains won't stand a chance! - OUT OF THIS WORLD LED LIGHTS AND SOUNDS: Upon the release of the trigger, the Kidplokio galaxy toy gun explodes with vibrant, colorful spinning lights and loud laser-like blasting sounds for the ultimate in intergalactic fighting fun! Kids will love the cool lights and sounds that make playtime more fun and realistic! - FUTURISTIC PRETEND PLAY: Expand little ones' imagination and creativity with this interactive space toy gun; A great toy to get kids off the couch and reduce screen time from cell phones and computers, the toy gun is action packed, boasting some seriously cool pretend play fighting features that will have kids up on their feet in search of the next alien invasion or a cross galaxy mission - NO TOY GUN ASSEMBLY NEEDED: The galaxy guardian space blaster toy gun comes assembled with batteries included, so the superhero action can start right out of the box! No screwdrivers, batteries or other tools required to get this galaxy guardian toy gun up and running - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 10 x 7 x 2 inches; Colors: Red, Black; Weight: 0.8lbs; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Batteries Included: Yes; Ages 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
